name: SKY130 Chopper Instrumentation Amplifier v2
description: Sub-µV noise to beat ADS1299. Power budget relaxed to 50 µW to allow proper biasing.
margin_rule: Every spec must pass with >= 25% margin

input_referred_noise_uvrms.description: Total noise in 0.5-150 Hz. Target: beat ADS1299's 1.0 uVrms by 2x.

cmrr_60hz_db.description: CMRR at 60 Hz WITH 0.1% Cin mismatch. Must match ADS1299.

input_offset_uv.description: Input-referred DC offset (tighter than v1 for sigma-delta accuracy)

power_uw.description: Relaxed from v1 (<15) — use the power for lower noise
